name: Dark Food Fight
description: Dark Food Fight is a dark version of Food Fight from Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: From his top secret lair, Kaos had engineered a dangerous material known as Dark Traptanium - which he intended to use to capture the Skylanders once and for all! Caught off guard, several Skylanders fell into his trap and were imprisoned within the crystal walls. But the Trap Masters arrived just in time and shattered the dark traps with their weapons made from pure Traptanium! Though they were free, they had absorbed enough of the dark energy within, transforming them into dark versions of themselves! Fortunately, they have learned to control it - combining the dark power with their own to fight Kaos and the forces of evil.
personality: Fortunately, they have learned to control it - combining the dark power with their own to fight Kaos and the forces of evil.

story.content: From his top secret lair, Kaos had engineered a dangerous material known as Dark Traptanium - which he intended to use to capture the Skylanders once and for all! Caught off guard, several Skylanders fell into his trap and were imprisoned within the crystal walls. But the Trap Masters arrived just in time and shattered the dark traps with their weapons made from pure Traptanium! Though they were free, they had absorbed enough of the dark energy within, transforming them into dark versions of themselves! Fortunately, they have learned to control it - combining the dark power with their own to fight Kaos and the forces of evil.

trivia: This is the only alter ego of Food Fight available as a toy. The rest of Food Fight's alter egos are digital-only.
He was the last Skylander to receive a Power Play.

trailers.name: Meet the Skylanders Dark Food Fight

gameplay: These are the starting and maximum Statistics for this Skylander in the Skylanders games. Dark Food Fight uses his Tomato Launcher and Blooms of Doom to overwhelm enemies.

basic.name: Tomato Launcher
basic.content: A rapid-fire tomato launcher that pelts enemies with juicy projectiles.

basic.name: Blooms of Doom
basic.content: Launch blooms that explode and cause damage to surrounding enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Extra-Ripe Tomatoes
basic_upgrades.content: Tomatoes are extra-ripe, causing even more damage on impact.

basic_upgrades.name: Heavy Harvest
basic_upgrades.content: The harvest is heavy, increasing the size and area of tomato blasts.

soulgems.name: Special Squash
soulgems.content: A powerful squash attack that deals massive area damage.
